import click
import httpx


pass_client = click.make_pass_decorator(httpx.Client, ensure=True)


@click.group()
@click.pass_context
def cli(ctx):
    ctx.ensure_object(httpx.Client)
    ctx.obj = httpx.Client(base_url="https://api.example.com", timeout=30)


@cli.command()
@click.option("--user-id", required=True)
@pass_client
def fetch_user(client, user_id):
    response = client.get(f"/users/{user_id}")
    click.echo(response.json())


@cli.command()
@click.option("--repo", required=True)
@pass_client
def check_repo(client, repo):
    client.base_url = httpx.URL("https://api.github.com")
    response = client.get(f"/repos/{repo}")
    click.echo(response.status_code)


@cli.command()
@click.option("--query", required=True)
@pass_client
def search(client, query):
    client.base_url = httpx.URL("https://search.example.com")
    response = client.get("/search", params={"q": query})
    for item in response.json()["hits"]:
        click.echo(item["title"])
